evals.expected_output: Uses default backend (droid) and default model (gpt-5.4). Dispatches in background, waits for completion, selectively verifies 2-3 key security claims using Read/Grep, presents report with verified/unverified/incorrect tags

evals.prompt: /swarm 用 droid 和 codex 同时 review backend/api.py 的 CORS 配置
evals.expected_output: Dispatches both droid and codex in parallel as background tasks, collects both outputs, cross-compares findings into consensus/unique/contradictions format

evals.prompt: /swarm 用 droid(claude-sonnet-4-6) 在 worktree 里给 backend/api.py 的 health check endpoints 加上 response_model
evals.expected_output: Dispatches droid with -w flag and claude-sonnet-4-6 model, waits for completion, verifies that response_model was added to health check endpoints

evals.prompt: /swarm use amp to review main...HEAD and focus on security issues in backend/api.py
evals.expected_output: Selects the amp backend in review-only mode, maps main...HEAD to the positional diff_description, passes backend/api.py via --files, passes the security focus via --instructions, and does not construct a generic free-form worker prompt
